extra.flavor: When catching, you'll likely notice some sass.
If you want to taste the rainbow, you have to catch it first.
Sometimes you have to catch a mound of minnows before you can find the marlin of your dreams.
Did you steal this from someone's pond? Not cool!
Tuna outside of a can? Whoever thought of this was a genius.
Fishing is usually easier when the fish aren't armed.
Do NOT call it a goldfish! She is a golden princess of good fortune.
Don't let its smile fool you, it will NOT be your friend.
So much fight it had to be named twice. Are you strong enough to bring one in?
You might be surprised to know that Red Arowana did not have plastic surgery for those chins.
You better bring the right tools if you want to nail this catch.
Totally cute, but also a tiny bit stabby.
Not all fish can be bathed in gold and stunningly beautiful. Someone has to be the sardine.
With a few cocktails, the shrimp can be the life of any party!
Now you see it, now you don't.
Butterfly in the sky, or fish in your net? Both are just as dreamy.
This isn't that kind of COD. Stop shooting!
Your ego must be as big as this monster if you think you can catch it. Good luck!
World's best hugger 5 years in a row, with only one accidental murder on record.
An elite catch that demands speed, skill, and strength. Can you keep up?
Charged and ready to light up your day!
Everyone says release the kraken, but no one asks the kraken if it wants to be released.
You can circle the globe and never catch a glimpse of this elusive legend.
WARNING: Avoid entrapment, or be swallowed into its vortex of doom.
Do you ever really capture the Aspidochelone, or does it capture you?
Oh, they'll definitely be biting... just make sure it's the bait and not your fingers!
Lobsters have the fame, but crayfish know how to get down and dirty.
The jellyfish's dance can mesmerize you into submission. Look away!
Chasing your blues away one fin twitch at a time.
Sometimes you have to go against the stream if you want to catch the biggest fish.
Is it a bird? Is it a plane? No, it's a fish!
Hopefully this starfish doesn't turn into a divafish.
This is the fish that looks like a cat, not the one sliding into your DMs.
Despite being named crappie, it actually is a pretty clean fish by fish standards.
One example of a beautiful creature that sometimes has thyroid issues.
A Slavic water spirit never hurt anyone. Right?
Goldfish don't have teeth and crush food with their throats. Just like my Grandpa!
This creature is spooky. Not because of the ghost cosplay, but spooky because... how does the sheet still look dry underwater???
This fish is eerie, but not in a threatening way. It seems to watch you as if it's pondering your intentions.
One might expect to find fish bones, but not alive like this and riding a spider. Wait, wrong skeleton.
Keeping this fish in a tank with other fish, is just ASKING for a tank full of more of them. (Not real)
GOBBLE THIS LIMITED TIME CREATURE UP!
It knows no fear, but you soon will, as this eerily heavy creature plots your demise.
Scylla’s wrath upon the tide, where whirlpools whisper of a twin's hide.
The guardian of the lake, or sent to collect the souls of mortals? You decide.
If you say it doesn’t exist, it’ll stab you with its horn.
There's a reason its head is so big. It's full of secrets.
A little fire, a little ice, and a whole lot of fight.
Enjoys long swims in icy rivers and a little bit of vodka before bedtime.
Swims like a dolphin, eats like a shark, and parties like it's 150 million B.C.
A nightmare that thrives in cold, dark waters, always lurking deep beneath the surface.
It's not the prince you hoped for, but you can still kiss it anyway.
You'd be snappy too if you kept getting stuck on your back.
It's a little shy, but if you knock politely it might stick its head out.
Oh no, it's a dangerous dragon! Rawr.
This isn't just a fish, it's a tank with fins.
This whiskered wonder may be old, but it will still put up one heck of a fight.
Leave the giant floating pancake alone. It's trying.
Even a squid can have an angsty vampire phase.
This thing's going to outlive us all. You might as well throw it back.
As you stare into the endless void of its eyes, you wonder, did you reel in a catch or a curse?
A fearsome creature with a keen eye for decoration.
Sharks are one thing to leave alone, but if you see a hint of tentacles below them, you might as well give up.
Does not taste as tangy as you might expect!
Clearly named after the sound it makes while being one of the fastest fish.
Little bastard is invasive in this area. Hunt it! Rawr! (lionfish say this, I've heard it)
Argh matey time to set sail! Oh this is a fish.
An underwater pirate's favorite companion!
This megalodong is not your friend. Size does matter.
A hoopfish found in the wild on a planet other than ours.
A hoopfish found in the wild on a planet other than ours, who lives in a golden biome.
A hoopfish found in the wild on a planet other than ours, with incredibly hard skin.
A hoopfish found in the wild on a planet other than ours, red like the blood of its enemies.
A hoopfish found in the wild on a planet other than ours, thought to be sad all the time.
A hoopfish found in the wild on a planet other than ours, loves watching a purple dinosaur at home.
Glowing bright like a diamond? No that's not the right lyrics.
This MF has blood on his fins. GET EM.
Is the green in the room with us now?
Black Neontetra? I need this in my tank.
Neon signs taste terrible.
I never considered purple tasting tangy, I imagined more on the sweet side.
A bunch of leeches, I'm surrounded by a BUNCH of leeches.
A bunch of color leeches are sucking on my arm. Stop them, Kenny. Make them STOP.
Pearls are the cause of batmen (plural).
Something something, beyond reproach?
Legends say this creature's cousin taught kung-foo.
His breath is as ghastly as his bite. What even is a snally?
This yellow perch looks like it's seen a ghost!
Perching is not the same as poaching, FYI.
It is happy to not live in the ocean, like its cousin.
This doesn't throw grenades, but it throwing grenades would make it easier to find.
Tastes great with milk! (lying)
Put this fish into your watery stable.
It's a fish in a box, the musical.
Mandarinfish like to pander-n-fish.
Clowning is their approach, the loach.
Steve died for this beautiful creature. RIP Steve.
Shad is bff's with Chad, right?
This fish's acting skills deserve an Oscar.
People always point out that this fish is snooty.
This creature knows your deepest desires and how to exploit them.
This is made from what seems to be the flesh of deceased creatures.
This creature has normalized existing in extremely volatile water temperatures.
This demonic entity not only bites, but also infects the mind of the victim with their bite.
Made in a lab with genetics from the fleshbiter and a biblical demon, it wont stop smiling at us...
When threatened by other creatures, this fish points its tail at the attacker.
This creature has developed a way to survive being eaten by generating new flesh constantly.
While seeming impractical, this demonic entity uses legs to effectively attack nearby victims.
This creature is rarely found, but often worshiped by cults making blood sacrifices.
THIS RAINBOW FISH IS ICONIC... unless you don't know how to read.
This fish is both insanely lucky to catch, and insane in its little brain.
This fish takes on the appearance of a man at sea. Why, what were you thinking it was named after?
Be careful, this creature has medical condition of a heart multiple sizes too small. Travels alone.
Do not lick this creature, it looks and smells like a candy cane but it's poisonous.
Intelligent creature, only falls for intelligent fisherfolk tricks.
The people of Naboon fear this.
The name doesn't include killer for no reason...
Strong enough to beat even the mightiest sea killers. Beware.
A giant space whale is nothing like a cat, the name is a trick. You got tricked.
IM A GOOFY GOOBER YEAH
What happens if you mix a crab, a snake, and a prison shank? This guy.
This creature is known to... take over your mind. Are you sure you want it in a tank?
Beautiful to look at... from a distance.
A fish named Garry. Edible, funny looking, massive ego.
Aggressive and travels in packs usually. Ew.
A leviathan class lifeform has been detected. Are you sure what you are doing is worth it?
This species NEVER loses their sons. Never.
Iconic pink stripe, abstracted sharp fins!
This kitty doesn't say Rawr, it says blub.
Depression is a way of life for this poor lil guy.
Not only is this koi beautiful, but somehow it has adapted to live in salty water.
Similar to a skeleton fish, this creature mysteriously lives and even thrives past life.
A fashion icon, this creature is like royalty under the water.
Don't let this tiny creature fool you. It does NOT go in the round hole. Deadly.
A fearsome creature born from mother nature's most wicked dreams.
Now this fish, the trout? That's what I'm talking about!
Which Witch dares challenge the witchiest of the witches?
A real sea-real killer doing serial killer things really not in the sea.
This pinkish fish is the lower class of the heart fish society
The purple heartfish is the working middle class of the heartfish society
The red heartfish is the leech of heartfish society, exploiting other heartfish for profit.
A rosefish a day keeps the divorce away
An incredibly lonely creature, can only be caught by hands due to how touch-deprived it is.
Do not eat this, it's FAKE chocolate!
A rarity on Love Island, this fish inspires all the other fish to love each other instead of rising up against their oppressors.
When a cupid fish faces resistance from anti-fascist heartfish, it becomes a lovecauser.
A dystopian creature that cannot be trusted with your heart.
Tinkerbell's juicer cousin. Glittery, golden, and absolutely will not grant you wishes.
Honey, I'm cooomb! ...okay sorry, please continue.
Pinocchio if he was seven feet long, all teeth, and absolutely seething.
Smooth like a baby's behind, except it's a fish and also armored.
It's not a frog. It's not a normal fish. It's a vibes-only deep-reef war crime.
Has more venom than your group chat at 2am. Do not touch with bare hands. We mean it.

extra.bio: Chad wasn’t always so perfect, but puberty blessed him, and here we are. He had a rough life as a kid, being bullied and picked on, so he got fit. Now uses his charisma and good looks to do good, even if he unintentionally steals your romantic interests and your mom’s love.
Margaux has been called stereotypical her entire life, often compared to a plastic doll. She's ready to prove people wrong by breaking out of social norms and making fishing culture her new life.
Time is money, and money is life. If you aren't here to talk about profit potential, what are you even doing?
They observe everything, patiently waiting... but for what? Their origins are unclear, but the ominous red glow emanating from beneath their cloak seems familiar.

For Zara, fishing is more than a hobby, it’s a way of life. Whether she’s running her bait and tackle shop, spending the day on the water reeling them in, or teaching teens the joy of fishing every summer at camp, there is nothing she’d rather be doing. She’s a proud part of her community, and always willing to give a helping hand to those in need.

Samuel is a family man. Formerly a woodworker, as soon as he looked into the eyes of his first child, he knew all he wanted to do was stay home and be with them. Luckily, his kid loves fishing and demands he takes them out to look at the "pwetty fishies".

He doesn't steal things, he rehomes them, and anyone who says differently can discuss it with the pack. The woods are no playground and are as dangerous as they come, but he can arrange some protection for you for the right price.

She may look like a delicate princess, but the water is her realm, and she has spent her life fiercely defending anything within it. When she's not going to war against oil companies and commercial fisheries, she's busy studying humans and learning all she can. Don’t end up on her bad side, or you’ll end up at the bottom of the ocean somewhere.
Melmsie: Owner and Content / Badosz: App Developer / Zain's Cat: Infrastructure and cat nip
A man living his dream: corn farming. He has a kind soul, and strong hands.

extra.flavor: For when you just need to stick those grubby little sausage fingers in the water for some fish action.
The best thing to hold while you're drinking and pretending to fish.

buffs.name: +1% chance for "rare" creatures (Requires Theory Crafter II)

extra.flavor: Grab your harpoon hop on the pontoon in the afternoon out on the lagoon and all the fish will soon swoon.

debuffs.name: Reduces chroma and unique chance by 20%

extra.flavor: I meant to grab my butterfly net, but I guess I can use this for some butterfly fish!

buffs.name: 5% chance to use no durability (Requires TCII)

extra.flavor: Illegal in real life, in Dank Memer the dynamite are re-usable and gently tickle the fish.

buffs.name: +1 fish token per catch (Requires Theory Crafter II)

extra.flavor: Why fish for yourself when a machine can do it for you?

debuffs.name: Requires a skill to catch bosses

extra.flavor: A favorite of archers who have no patience to go fishing.

buffs.name: +0.5% chance to catch bosses (Requires Theory Crafter II)

extra.flavor: Magnets in dank memer lore pick up more than just metal stuff, get over it.

buffs.name: Double the chance to catch skeleton keys
+3xp per item caught (Requires Theory Crafter II)

extra.flavor: Your grandfather's grandfather probably used this bait, and the fish still love it. Can't go wrong with a classic.
extra.explanation: Reduces the chances of catching any item by 50% of it's base chance. Consumed when a fish is caught.

extra.flavor: A fish is never early or late, but precisely on time.
extra.explanation: All creatures at your location show their face, even when they're not normally out at this hour! Used when catching a fish outside of its normal time.

extra.flavor: I like big fishies, and I cannot lie, all you other fishermen can't deny, when you drop a weighted bait, and feel the boat start to shake, you get pumped!
extra.explanation: Guarantees that your fish will not be on the smaller side of their possible weight. Used on every creature caught.

extra.flavor: Sure, let's just throw gold in the water in a desperate attempt for high quality fish. No big deal.
extra.explanation: Increases the chance to catch a high-quality fish. Used when a high-quality fish is caught.

extra.flavor: Normally people put lucky charms in their pockets, but this works too. Anything for a luck boost, am I right?
extra.explanation: Increases the luck on the rarity of fish you catch. Used when anything is caught.

extra.flavor: Who needs fish when you can collect treasure?
extra.explanation: Fish never bite this, so you'll only get non-creature loot. Used when catching something that isn't a creature.

extra.flavor: This bait only has an eye for the really valuable fish. Wait... why is it looking at me like that?
extra.explanation: Heavily increases the odds of catching a unique variant or chroma fish. Found during Halloween.

extra.flavor: Halloween isn't just a season, it's a way of life! If this bait doesn't lure some spooky stuff your way, nothing will.
extra.explanation: Adds a chance to get Halloween items while fishing! Used when a Halloween item is caught.

extra.flavor: No one tell Momma we used her cooking for bait, or the Thanksgiving fish you catch won't be the only thing getting filleted!
extra.explanation: Gives the chance to catch a Turkey Fish alongside your regular catches. Used when a Turkey Fish is caught.

extra.flavor: I certainly hope I got the Naboo Swamp & Gungan Sub Lego set that I asked for.
extra.explanation: Adds a chance to get winter items while fishing. Used when a winter item is caught.

extra.flavor: You can never have enough money! Well, unless the IRS is asking, then... what money?
extra.explanation: Sells your creatures instantly for both coins and tokens instead of sending them to your bucket. Used when a creature is sold.

extra.flavor: This was used to catch a monster. Now, the monster uses it.
extra.explanation: This bait increases both the chance to catch a boss (5x) and the chance to catch a boss variant (2x). Consumed when you catch a boss.

extra.flavor: Nothing tastes better than leveling up!
extra.explanation: Gives 3x season pass XP on any catch AND gives 1-3XP points for regular Dank Memer levels. Used when any season pass XP is gained while fishing.

extra.flavor: Bait made from the dried meat of actual magical reindeer. Yum!
extra.explanation: Doubles the token value of what you catch with this bait, but increases cooldown for fishing by 2.5x for your next catch. Consumed when catching a creature and increasing the cooldown.

extra.flavor: Why work when you could simply fish?
extra.explanation: This bait will add a chance to get any work-related item that is a collectible, sellable, or loot box — consumed when you catch a work item. Additionally, when working as a Fisherman, you cannot get fired if you've caught a work item with this bait on the same day.

extra.flavor: Omega bait for omega nerds to catch omega (not really) fish.
extra.explanation: Heavily increases the odds of catching a unique variant or chroma variant creature. Consumed when a unique or chroma variant is caught.

extra.flavor: Bait used to be believable... now we're catching farmers?
extra.explanation: This bait has a chance to pull up farm related loot while fishing.

extra.flavor: The fish that eat hearts shouldn't be trusted...
extra.explanation: Fish caught with this bait count 3x for NPC tasks, and using this bait has an increased chance to spawn NPCs. Consumed when a fish for an NPC is caught, or when an NPC is spawned.

extra.flavor: A classic wooden bucket, you're lucky the fish don't escape from this. Wait, write that idea down!
This does not hold any evil plankton or robot wives named Karen.
Is this bucket made OUT of pepes, or is it just made in honor of pepe? Please respond...
Some say god is a man, some say god is a woman. We say god is a bucket.
Uh, why sell the fish in the bucket instead of just selling the solid gold bucket?
This bucket is made from pink plastic bits. If you are caught up on Dank Memer lore... Those poor fish.
A bucket made of the bones of a fallen warrior. Legend says it speaks to you at night.
Fuck it. (Not the bucket)
Alien, weird, outlandish.
Naughty naughty!
Piss? No piss here.
Shine bright like a christmas light.
Take a fish out, I dare you.
A bucket fit for the alpha and omega.
A beautiful ruby studded bucket.
Fit all your glass eyeballs in here!
This bucket was born out of hellfire singing the skin of innocent souls.
This bucket knows things that it shouldn't, and its staring right at you.
Held by demonic hands, this bucket previously held vile souls.
This bucket is made of... ghost byproduct.
The bucket itself is a gift, wow!
The bucket is made from discarded trees right after Christmas.
Lick this bucket with caution, fish do sit in it after all.
This bucket abducts your fish. Yuck.
I probed this alien after it probed me. It was fun.
It's like, even better than the golden! (In looks, not capacity)
I LOVE FISHING I LOVE FISHING I LOVE FISHING
This bucket is definitely abstract...
Somehow this quilt doesn't leak. Grandma did great!
A bucket made from pure neon light.
Corn corn the magical fruit. The more you eat... Wait no.
A basked full of goodies, either fish or food you decide.
Take a ride on my big old tractor?
Crispy fish makes a happy dragon
Filled with the blood of Dank Memer's enemies
Yo, how is it breathing??
In loving memory of all the dead ideas in Dank Memer. RIP pink phallics.
Not even a little jaded...?
Sometimes I think I could do it with a broken heart
As yummy as the fish you put inside... right??
It's coarse, and rough, and irritating, and it gets everywhere. Especially in the fish gills.
I harnessed the power of the sun. In a bucket. For fish. Nobel prize when?
SPF infinity. The fish are screaming but at least they aren't sunburnt.
Two parts rum, one part regret, zero parts ID check. Cheers.
Once stonks, now worthless? Not to your fish tank!
Dive down into my tank, babe.
This ship held the secrets to the "pls" prefix.
NOT from the dollar store.
Totally real gold.
I'd eat brunch under this.
Spoopy.
A colorful cartoonish haunted house to haunt your lack of fishing skills.
This glows without a candle inside. Spoopy.
The skull of the people who think skull emojis are cool.
Your new bff in your new home!
GIANT GEM GIANT GEM GIANT GEM GIANT GEM GIANT GEM GIANT GEM
Don't eat this after you put it in the water...
Have you heard of Krampus? I sure hope so. He's heard of you.
Real tree, not plastic.
Frosty! No! Frosty's cousin, Chilly the blow man!
Silver and iconic.
Inside is the gift you need the most this year.
Classic and evergreen.
Sled on down to your mom's house, I'll be there.
Smoochy smoochy, grandma's here.
Not unique, unlike most snowflakes.
Let people know you're gone!
Sail your way into my heart.
Take a load off and get some drink in you, the sea demands it.
I'm not a spy, I'm doubl-oon-seven.
Who needs to lay in the sand?
The same icon as your movies folder.
Relax, these don't exist in Kansas.
An alive one, thank god.
Surfs up, t*ts out.
1v1 rust, pistols only.
Always points towards Dank Memer's game servers.
Sign me up for the 666 fire brigade.
I have a pet rat snake in my back yard.
Your tank is FIRE bro
Someone died here, I think?
He's a mean one...
The noble reindeer, not turned into jerky because it is made of stone.
How did this even freeze? Ice storm, obviously.
He's not allowed, his heart is too big these days.
Immortal Santa in immortal gold.
Ammo for the coming war...
Holy shit this is terrifying. Snow men can lift weights?
Gas giant, like your mother.
Using this, you can see all the people who asked.
Zero gravity, zero fucks given.
If you like it you should put a ring on it.
Not as cool as the James Webb, but pretty cool still.
Houston, we have Whataburger.
Space man or space frog. You decide.
Do you think they have alien climate change?
Pick me. Love me. Abduct me.
Ayy yooo put the tentacles away step-alien.
WARNING: KEEP OUT
Bacta tank? Naur this is an alien test tube.
Lil dude looks so dope. I wanna be lil dude.
Cute lil guy watching your cute lil farm
It's not green, so you know what that means.
Are there any children in there?
Serial Killers are the ultimate true crimes
Just a little stabby stab to open up your day.
Hearts don't actually look like this you know
Love for the love god
He went out for a swim and came back as a sandcastle.
Fresh fruit, no fish included. Probably. Don't ask about the lemonade.
He's saved zero lives. To his credit, he looks great standing there.

extra.description: During this event, all fish sold for tokens have a 2x modifier on the tokens you get from selling. This DOES stack with skills that modify token profit.
During this event, tools will be unable to break. Meaning you only need the one tool you have until the event is over, fish your heart out with that cute lil harpoon.
Similar to Toolnacity, during this event baits are unable to break. Prismatic who?
While this event is active, so are any limited-time locations! Miss that old crypt keeper's pond? Well look out for it during this rare, but worthwhile, random event.
While the idle crack event is running, your idle machine attempts to make catches at 2x the frequency that you have unlocked. Think idle fishing is OP? Just wait till you try it with this!
While the Crazy Chroma event is ongoing, you will have a 2x chance for a chroma variant to spawn while fishing. This stacks with chroma boosts from baits and skills also!
The NPCs somehow fell into a time space rift, and during this event they're all available at every location!

During the Clear Waters event, each successful finishing minigame will have three possible shadows to catch instead of the standard one, and every user will be able to see the shadow outlines of the creatures available rather than a generic shadow. Anything that isn't a creature (like seaweed) will still be the generic shadow.
While the Pass Cheesing event is ongoing, you will have 2.5x fishing season xp!
While the Speed Fishing event is ongoing, your cooldown for fishing is 5 seconds!
While the Instant Travel event is ongoing, any travel you want to do is instantly completed!

While the Quality Time event is ongoing, you will only catch high quality fish at a minimum! This event also overrides things that don't normally grant you high quality catches, including tools and skills.
While the Lucky Caster event is ongoing, fish will spawn on every tile in the fish minigame.
Sell creatures for 25% more coins and get 25% more coins from NPCs.
Sell creatures for 40% more coins and get 50% more coins from NPCs.
Sell creatures for 55% more coins and get 75% more coins from NPCs.
Sell creatures for 75% more coins and get 100% more coins from NPCs.
Sell creatures for 85% more coins and get 250% more coins from NPCs.
Sell creatures for 100% more coins and get 350% more coins from NPCs.
Unlock happy hour, you earn 1.3x coins from selling creatures during this hour.
During happy hours, you earn 2x tokens from selling creatures.
Unlock an additional happy hour at 4am UTC (<t:1782014400:t>).
During happy hours, you earn 2x season pass XP.
During happy hours, increase your coin sale multiplier for creatures to 1.4x
During happy hours, increase your coin sale multiplier for creatures to 1.5x
Reduce all prices in the fishing shop by a total of 5%.
Unlock additional offers in the fish shop to be purchased.
Reduce all prices in the fishing shop by a total of 10%.
During happy hours, fish token prices are 5% lower.
Have a 3% chance to pay nothing when buying something from the fishing shop.
Reduce all prices in the fishing shop by a total of 15%.
Reduce all prices in the fishing shop by a total of 25%.
Reduce the time to travel to 40 minutes.
Reduce the time to travel to 30 minutes.
Your first travel of the day only takes 3 minutes.
Reduce the time to travel to 5 minutes.
When a tool breaks, if it’s in the fish shop’s current rotation, give 15% of the cost of that tool back in tokens.
When a bait breaks, if it’s in the fish shop’s current rotation, give 15% of the cost of that bait back in tokens.
When getting token refunds back for broken baits or tools, have a 10% chance to give a full refund instead.
When giving a full refund (Tier III triggers) back, have an additional 5% chance to give the full refund AND a brand new tool/bait that was used as well .
5% token discount on fish boosts
10% token discount on fish boosts
You can reroll your boosts 1 time per UTC day
You can reroll your boosts 3 times per UTC day
12% token discount, 5% coin discount, and 5% gem discount on fish boosts
Unlock the ability to catch high quality fish.
Increase the chance of catching high quality fish by 3%. (additive)
Increase the chance of catching creatures with "absurdly rare" odds by 1%. Mythical does not count, their "absurdly rare" odds are different logic.
Increase the chance of catching unique fish variants by 1%. (additive)
Increase the chance of catching chroma fish variants by 2%. (additive)
Reduce the chance of mines spawning by 10%
Have a 2% chance for a second shadow to spawn in the fish minigame.
See the unique shadow of any fish spawning during the fish minigame.
Reduce the chance of mines spawning by 25%
Have a 10% chance for a second shadow to spawn in the fish minigame.
Have a 15% chance for a second shadow to spawn in the fish minigame.
Decrease the chance to catch nothing by 30% with your bare hands.
Decrease the chance to catch nothing by 45% with your bare hands.
Increase the chance to catch “unique” variants by 3% with your bare hands. (additive)
Increase the chance to catch “chroma” variants by 1.25x with your bare hands.
When mythical fish are around, your chance to catch them multiplies by 2.
Mythical fish caught sell for 2.5x their base token value.
Your bait and tools will not lose durability when a mythical fish is caught.
Helps you catch slightly heavier fish.
Increase the chance to catch high quality fish by 2%.
Increase the chance to interact with an NPC while fishing by 5%.
Once per UTC day, increase the chance of catching a boss by 5%. Boost is lost daily once a boss is caught.
Increase the chance of an NPC encounter by 1.5%
Increase time to complete NPC tasks by 15%
When getting a gift, have an ability to pick between 2 options.
Increase the chance of a "task" NPC encounter by 10% (additive)
Increase time to complete NPC tasks by 250%
Increase the chance of a "game" NPC encounter by 10% (additive)
Fish caught from idle fishing give you season pass XP.
Fish caught from idle fishing sell for 15% more.
Fish caught from idle fishing sell for 2x tokens.
While idle fishing is running and its storage isn’t full, you get 1.5x NPC reputation.
While idle fishing is running and its storage isn’t full, you get a 1.25x higher NPC spawn chance.
While idle fishing is running and its storage isn't full, the max amount you can rob based on your wallet is increased by 2x.
While idle fishing is running and its storage isn’t full, you have a 2x XP multi for regular dank memer leveling.
Have 10% chance for any positive NPC dialogue to be twice as effective.
See which dialogue options will yield positive or negative results.
See the exact rep changes you might get on any given interaction.
Have 20% chance for any positive NPC dialogue to be twice as effective.
Increase the chance of an NPC encounter by 2%
See on the map where NPCs are currently at when traveling.
When you get a gift from an NPC, there is a 10% chance another NPC will get jealous and mail you a gift as well.
Increase the chance to catch a chroma variant by 1.03x
When you trigger a game encounter with an NPC, if you have a "positive" rep, you can choose to fight or RPS them.
When you get any gift from an NPC, it is doubled.

items.name: Friends with the Trash man I

extra.description: Trash items now give fish season xp when caught.

items.name: Friends with the Trash man II

extra.description: When you get unlucky and catch nothing, get a 35% chance for the trash man to step in and give you a trash item instead.

items.name: Friends with the Trash man III

extra.description: Gain 5 rep with nearby NPCs when you pick up trash.

items.name: Friends with the Trash man IV

extra.description: Automatically sell trash for 2 tokens instead of collecting it to your inventory. (Can be toggled in /fish settings)

items.name: Friends with the Trash man V

extra.description: When you get unlucky and catch nothing, get a 50% chance for the trash man to step in and give you a trash item instead.

items.name: Friends with the Trash man VI

extra.description: When automatically selling trash items for tokens when caught, increase the payment for the trash from 2 tokens each to 5 tokens each.

While your daily fishing streak is 7+ days, sell creatures for 3% more coins.
Get 1 grace day per rolling 7-day window. A single missed UTC day won't break your daily fishing streak.
While your daily fishing streak is 14+ days, sell creatures for 5% more coins.
While your daily fishing streak is 21+ days, sell creatures for 10% more coins.
While your daily fishing streak is 30+ days, sell creatures for 15% more coins, gain 2x NPC reputation, and your grace day allowance increases to 2 per rolling 7-day window.
